case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. ROSA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-06-2012 AT 2:00PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
